verdicts.note: Lower taxes are an explicit priority, but the dossier gives no maximal tax-cut mechanism.
A first campaign supports renewal, while entrepreneurial experience makes the maximal outsider score too strong.
A first run with no documented institutional record supports the outsider pole, but the sparse profile does not justify high confidence.
Former mayoral and council service establish a proven elected record, though the dossier lacks detail sufficient for the maximal incumbent pole.
Local decision-making is explicit, but no sweeping devolution mechanism supports the maximal score.

review_notes: All 12 original candidate-axis pairs were reviewed exactly once (7 upheld, 5 adjusted). No omitted axis had sufficiently specific evidence for a supported missing proposal.
